# Riddiim
> Music discovery app. Explore new artists, curate playlists, and discover Caribbean and global music. The Record Room experience for real music lovers.

## What We Offer
Music discovery app. Explore new artists, curate playlists, and discover Caribbean and global music. The Record Room experience for real music lovers.
